summary.business_type: B2B Industrial — HTC Technology for Wastewater Treatment
top_findings: robots.txt missing — crawlers have no directives, sitemap undiscoverable
XML sitemap missing — 10 pages + blog have no crawl map
Header/footer via document.write() — navigation invisible to non-JS crawlers
Open Graph tags missing on 9/10 pages — blank LinkedIn/WhatsApp previews
llms.txt missing — AI search engines have no content guidance
quick_wins: Add OG meta tags to all pages (1 hr)
Add <link rel=preload> for hero image (5 min)
Add defer to non-critical scripts (15 min)
Fix broken logo URL in Organization schema (5 min)

categories.name: Technical SEO
what_works: Viewport meta tag correct
Images have width/height attributes preventing CLS
Hero image uses fetchpriority=high and loading=eager
lang=pl set correctly
No SPA shell — content is in raw HTML

findings.title: robots.txt missing
findings.description: 404 at domain root. No crawl directives, no sitemap reference.
findings.recommendation: Create /robots.txt with User-agent: *, Disallow: /v5/dziekujemy.html, Sitemap reference

findings.title: XML sitemap missing
findings.description: Neither /sitemap.xml nor /v5/sitemap.xml exists. 10 HTML pages + blog subtree undiscoverable.
findings.recommendation: Generate sitemap.xml covering all canonical URLs and submit to GSC

findings.title: document.write() for header/footer partials
findings.description: All navigation links invisible to raw HTML crawlers and AI bots. Pages linked only via mobile nav (teo.html, case-lubin.html, misja.html, blog/) unreachable without JS.
findings.recommendation: Replace with build-time 11ty includes or server-side includes

findings.title: Open Graph tags missing on 9/10 pages
findings.description: Homepage and 8 inner pages lack og:title, og:description, og:image. LinkedIn and WhatsApp show blank previews.
findings.recommendation: Add OG meta tags to all pages

findings.title: Canonical URLs expose /v5/ subdirectory
findings.description: All canonicals use btcconsulting.pl/v5/index.html — version prefix signals staging.
findings.recommendation: Serve from root before first production indexing

findings.title: Security headers entirely absent
findings.description: Missing HSTS, X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, CSP, Referrer-Policy.
findings.recommendation: Configure on production host (Cloudflare Pages headers file or _headers)

findings.title: dziekujemy.html indexable
findings.description: Thank-you page has no noindex — will appear in search results.
findings.recommendation: Add <meta name='robots' content='noindex, follow'>

findings.title: favicon.ico missing
findings.description: 404 on every page load — minor crawl budget waste.
findings.recommendation: Create and deploy favicon

categories.name: Content Quality
what_works: Strong title tag (67 chars) with primary keyword
Meta description (152 chars) with urgency signal and key terms
HTC keyword well-distributed (12+ occurrences)
Dual-reader UX pattern (wójt vs engineer) is effective
FAQ content aligned with JSON-LD schema
High information density per sentence

findings.title: H1 missing primary keywords
findings.description: H1 is 'Rozwiąż problem osadu na zawsze. Bez szoku dla budżetu' — neither 'HTC' nor 'osady ściekowe' appears.
findings.recommendation: Revise to include primary keyword naturally, e.g. 'Rozwiąż problem osadów ściekowych na zawsze'

findings.title: No named author or team member on page
findings.description: No byline, photo, or credential anchor — E-E-A-T trust gap for B2B industrial.
findings.recommendation: Add named expert with credential line near Market Position section

findings.title: UWWTD keyword underweighted
findings.description: Appears only in hero micro-label and meta description — should anchor at least one H2 or FAQ.
findings.recommendation: Add UWWTD compliance section with dedicated H2

findings.title: Statistics lack source attribution
findings.description: 3,873 WWTP figure, 6.9-year ROI, 60% cost reduction have no source citation.
findings.recommendation: Add parenthetical sources (e.g. 'wg GUS 2023' or 'model BTC')

findings.title: Case evidence thin
findings.description: Only 1 live installation + 1 planned + 1 placeholder card.
findings.recommendation: Mark planned project clearly as Q4 2026; remove or rethink placeholder card

categories.name: On-Page SEO
what_works: Title tag within optimal range with brand + keyword
Meta description strong with HTC, osady ściekowe, urgency
Good H2 distribution across sections
5 deep pages linked from homepage with descriptive anchor text

findings.title: H1-keyword mismatch for target queries
findings.description: Primary keywords absent from the page's most weighted on-page signal.
findings.recommendation: Include 'HTC' or 'osady ściekowe' in H1

findings.title: Missing internal links to E-E-A-T pages
findings.description: /misja.html and /whitepaper.html not linked from homepage.
findings.recommendation: Link whitepaper from Market Position section, misja from footer or about

findings.title: FAQ items not semantic headings
findings.description:
FAQ questions use

instead of

or
.
findings.recommendation: Use H3 tags for FAQ questions to reinforce schema signal

categories.name: Schema / Structured Data
what_works: Organization JSON-LD with legalName, foundingDate, areaServed
FAQPage JSON-LD with 5 well-formed Q&A pairs
sameAs with LinkedIn

findings.title: Logo URL broken — references non-existent PNG
findings.description: Schema references /v5/assets/img/logo.png but only /v5/assets/svg/logo.svg exists.
findings.recommendation: Change to 'https://btcconsulting.pl/v5/assets/svg/logo.svg'

findings.title: PostalAddress incomplete
findings.description: Missing streetAddress and postalCode — limits Knowledge Panel and LocalBusiness eligibility.
findings.recommendation: Add full address details

findings.title: Missing WebSite + SearchAction schema
findings.description: No sitelinks search box eligibility.
findings.recommendation: Add WebSite schema with SearchAction pointing to blog search

findings.title: Missing Service schema
findings.description: Core HTC offering has no structured representation for AI Overviews.
findings.recommendation: Add Service JSON-LD for HTC technology implementation

findings.title: Missing telephone in ContactPoint
findings.description: Email-only ContactPoint suppresses phone in Knowledge Panel.
findings.recommendation: Add telephone field with +48 608 003 458

categories.name: Performance (CWV)
what_works: Images have explicit width/height — low CLS risk
Hero image uses fetchpriority=high
No ads, iframes, or dynamically injected banners
Minimal interactive elements — low INP risk

findings.title: 5 render-blocking scripts without defer/async
findings.description: header.js, pl.js, i18n.js, footer.js, reveal.js all render-blocking.
findings.recommendation: Add defer to pl.js, i18n.js, reveal.js (header/footer need architectural fix)

findings.title: Google Fonts CSS render-blocking
findings.description: External stylesheet blocks CSSOM despite preconnect hints.
findings.recommendation: Self-host Barlow via @font-face to eliminate external dependency

findings.title: Hero image not preloaded
findings.description: No <link rel=preload as=image> in <head> despite fetchpriority=high.
findings.recommendation: Add preload hint in <head> for LCP improvement of 200-400ms

categories.name: AI Search Readiness
what_works: FAQPage schema with 5 self-contained Q&A — strongest citability asset
Organization schema with entity anchoring signals
Stat strip with discrete, attributable numbers
Named commercial reference (MPWiK Lubin)

findings.title: No robots.txt allowing AI crawlers
findings.description: GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot have no explicit allow directive.
findings.recommendation: Create robots.txt explicitly allowing AI crawlers

findings.title: No llms.txt
findings.description: No machine-readable brand identity or citation guidance for AI systems.
findings.recommendation: Create llms.txt with brand, key claims, preferred citation format, page links

findings.title: Body passages too short for citation
findings.description: Passages are 30-60 words — below 134-167 word optimal range.
findings.recommendation: Expand each section with sourced statistics and direct-answer openings

findings.title: No YouTube channel
findings.description: 0.737 correlation between YouTube and AI citation frequency.
findings.recommendation: Create channel with 3-min HTC explainer video

findings.title: sameAs limited to LinkedIn only
findings.description: No Wikidata, YouTube, or official registry links.
findings.recommendation: Expand sameAs array as new platform presences are created

categories.name: Images
what_works: All images have width/height attributes
Hero image: loading=eager + fetchpriority=high
Below-fold images: loading=lazy
Alt text present on all images in Polish

findings.title: No WebP/AVIF format
findings.description: All images are JPEG — modern formats would reduce payload 25-50%.
findings.recommendation: Convert to WebP with <picture> fallback for JPEG

findings.title: No responsive srcset
findings.description: Single resolution served to all viewports.
findings.recommendation: Add srcset with multiple resolutions for mobile optimization

phases.name: Phase 1: Critical Fixes
items: Create robots.txt with sitemap ref + AI crawler allows (15 min)
Generate XML sitemap for all pages + blog (30 min)
Fix Organization schema logo URL PNG→SVG (5 min)
Add noindex to dziekujemy.html (5 min)
Add OG meta tags to all 9 pages (1 hr)
Add <link rel=preload> for hero image (5 min)
Add defer to pl.js, i18n.js, reveal.js (15 min)

phases.name: Phase 2: High-Impact Improvements
items: Create llms.txt (1 hr)
Replace document.write() with 11ty build-time includes (2-4 hrs)
Add HTC/osady ściekowe to H1 (15 min)
Add UWWTD compliance section with H2 (1 hr)
Add Service + WebSite JSON-LD schemas (1 hr)
Complete Organization schema (streetAddress, telephone) (15 min)
Add source attribution to statistics (30 min)
Link whitepaper from Market Position section (5 min)

phases.name: Phase 3: Content & Authority
items: Create informational HTC explainer page for awareness queries (1 day)
Add named team/expert with photos to homepage (2 hrs)
Add process diagram/schematic SVG to HTC section (1 day)
Expand body sections to 134-167 words each (1 day)
Configure security headers on production host (30 min)
Plan clean URL structure — remove /v5/ prefix (architecture decision)
Implement IndexNow in deploy pipeline (30 min)

phases.name: Phase 4: Monitoring & Iteration
items: Create YouTube channel with HTC explainer video (1-2 weeks)
Self-host Barlow font (1 hr)
Add BreadcrumbList to blog/inner pages (30 min)
Convert images to WebP with <picture> fallback (2 hrs)
Set up SEO drift baseline for ongoing monitoring (1 hr)
